title: oberonia wappeana
intro: Oberonia wappeana is a species of orchid native to India. This plant is used in traditional medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oberonia wappeana are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as an antiseptic agent. Oberonia wappeana can be prepared in various herbal forms, including extracts, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
